query:
SELECT o.id, c.location_url1, c.location_url2, o.location_link 
FROM orders o 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE o.status = 'accepted' OR o.status = 'in_transit'
ORDER BY o.id DESC 
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT o.id, c.location_url1, c.location_url2, o.location_link 
FROM orders o
